mapper.sql: id, hostname, ip_address, mac_address, cpu_architecture, cpu_name, logical_cores, memory_available, memory_total, os_detail, os_name, os_type, os_version, os_build, status, last_seen_at, deleted, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM `hosts` WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM `hosts` WHERE mac_address = #{macAddress} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE `hosts` SET status = CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, updated_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) > 4 THEN '0' ELSE '1' END WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `hosts` ( hostname, ip_address, mac_address, cpu_architecture, cpu_name, logical_cores, memory_available, memory_total, os_detail, os_name, os_type, os_version, os_build, status, last_seen_at, deleted ) VALUES ( #{hostname}, #{ipAddress}, #{macAddress}, #{cpuArchitecture}, #{cpuName}, #{logicalCores}, #{memoryAvailable}, #{memoryTotal}, #{osDetail}, #{osName}, #{osType}, #{osVersion}, #{osBuild}, #{status}, #{lastSeenAt}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE `hosts` SET hostname = #{hostname}, ip_address = #{ipAddress}, mac_address = #{macAddress}, cpu_architecture = #{cpuArchitecture}, cpu_name = #{cpuName}, logical_cores = #{logicalCores}, memory_available = #{memoryAvailable}, memory_total = #{memoryTotal}, os_detail = #{osDetail}, os_name = #{osName}, os_type = #{osType}, os_version = #{osVersion}, os_build = #{osBuild}, status = #{status}, last_seen_at = #{lastSeenAt}, deleted = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `hosts` ( hostname, ip_address, mac_address, cpu_architecture, cpu_name, logical_cores, memory_available, memory_total, os_detail, os_name, os_type, os_version, os_build, status, last_seen_at, deleted ) VALUES ( #{hostname}, #{ipAddress}, #{macAddress}, #{cpuArchitecture}, #{cpuName}, #{logicalCores}, #{memoryAvailable}, #{memoryTotal}, #{osDetail}, #{osName}, #{osType}, #{osVersion}, #{osBuild}, #{status}, #{lastSeenAt}, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE hostname = VALUES(hostname), ip_address = VALUES(ip_address), cpu_architecture = VALUES(cpu_architecture), cpu_name = VALUES(cpu_name), logical_cores = VALUES(logical_cores), memory_available = VALUES(memory_available), memory_total = VALUES(memory_total), os_detail = VALUES(os_detail), os_name = VALUES(os_name), os_type = VALUES(os_type), os_version = VALUES(os_version), os_build = VALUES(os_build), status = VALUES(status), last_seen_at = VALUES(last_seen_at), deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE `hosts` SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE mac_address = #{macAddress} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE `hosts` SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM `hosts` WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = '1' ORDER BY updated_at DESC
